name: Pasta Giovanni
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup coarsely chopped pecans or walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water and salt to a boil in a large pot.
2. Add 1 tablespoon olive oil and the whole garlic clove (this prevents pasta from sticking and adds flavor).
3. Add pasta and bring to a boil according to package directions, stirring occasionally.
4. In a separate pan, sauté minced garlic over moderately high heat until soft.
5. Add sliced mushrooms and cook for 2-3 minutes until softened. Remove from heat and add nuts, parsley, black olives, and pimientos. Mix well.
6. Drain pasta and return to the pot.
7. Add olive oil mixture and toss pasta.
8. Serve warm with grated Romano cheese sprinkled on top. Enjoy.
